content: create a lawn companyy web site that will have cursive text, and will have call to action popups after x amount of time has past. we showw have heor images, and sliders ,  and testimoials

brief.goal: Convert homeowners into paying lawn care customers through trust-building and clear lead capture
brief.audience: Homeowners who value curb appeal and are willing to pay for professional lawn care services

visual_direction.layout: Hero-first design with prominent imagery, testimonial carousels, and strategic popup placement that doesn't interrupt core user flows
visual_direction.typography: Script/cursive fonts for brand accents and emotional appeal, paired with clean sans-serif for service details and readability
visual_direction.color_usage: Rich greens as primary (lawn association) with earth tones and white space to convey premium quality and natural expertise
visual_direction.motion: Smooth image sliders showcasing before/after work, subtle fade-ins for testimonials, and non-intrusive timed popups (30+ seconds delay)
visual_direction.density: Spacious layout that lets hero imagery breathe while maintaining clear service information hierarchy

content_priorities: Lead capture with clear contact methods
Visual proof of quality work through before/after imagery
avoid: image sliders that auto-advance too quickly
cursive text for body content that hurts readability
open_questions: What specific lawn care services should be prioritized (mowing, landscaping, fertilization, etc.)?
